description: Multi-value selection dropdown with chip, delimiter, or checkbox display modes, filtering, grouping, select-all, max selection limit, server-side data provider, and custom item/value templates.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Static list of items. Ignored when DataProvider is set.

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Server-side data provider. When set, Items is ignored.

parameters.name: IdField
parameters.description: Extracts a string key for @key and ExcludedIds. Defaults to ValueField.ToString().

parameters.name: GroupField
parameters.description: Extracts a group name for grouped display.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Visual mode for selected items. Default: Chip.

parameters.name: Delimiter
parameters.description: Delimiter string for Delimiter mode. Default: ", ".

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text when no items are selected.

parameters.name: HelpText
parameters.description: Help text shown below when no error is present.

parameters.name: AllowFiltering
parameters.description: Enables the search input in the dropdown. Default: true.

parameters.name: Debounce
parameters.description: Debounce delay in ms for server-side filtering. Default: 300.

parameters.name: ShowSelectAll
parameters.description: Shows Select All / Deselect All control.

parameters.name: HideSelectedItems
parameters.description: Hides already-selected items from the dropdown.

parameters.name: ShowClearButton
parameters.description: Shows a clear-all button. Default: true.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Custom template for each item in the dropdown.

parameters.name: ValueTemplate
parameters.description: Custom template for each selected value chip.

parameters.name: NoRecordsTemplate
parameters.description: Template shown when no items match.

parameters.name: OnFiltering
parameters.description: Fires when the filter text changes.

examples.title: Basic multi-select with chips
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="TagDto" TValue="int" @bind-Values="selectedTagIds" Items="@tags" DisplayField="@(t => t.Name)" ValueField="@(t => t.Id)" Label="Tags" Placeholder="Select tags..." />

examples.title: Checkbox mode with select all
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="UserDto" TValue="Guid" @bind-Values="selectedUserIds" Items="@users" DisplayField="@(u => u.FullName)" ValueField="@(u => u.Id)" Mode="MultiSelectMode.CheckBox" ShowSelectAll="true" MaxSelectionCount="5" Label="Assign Users" />

examples.title: Server-side data provider with grouping
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="ProductDto" TValue="int" @bind-Values="productIds" DataProvider="@productProvider" DisplayField="@(p => p.Name)" ValueField="@(p => p.Id)" GroupField="@(p => p.Category)" AllowFiltering="true" Label="Products" />
